mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_behavior_score_detail (id, user_id, behavior_id, feature_type, add_score, score_after, behavior_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{behaviorId}, #{featureType}, #{addScore}, #{scoreAfter}, #{behaviorTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, behavior_id, feature_type, add_score, score_after, behavior_time, create_time, update_time FROM user_behavior_score_detail WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY behavior_time DESC
